entries.notes: Business detail by integer ID. Plural /businesses/ returns 404; only singular /business/<int>.
Logged-in user profile. Returns 404 when not authenticated.

Venue landing page. SSR-renders window.$REDUX_STATE with full hydration: app.activeAuth.businessId, business, calendar.offerings (experiences with PRIX_FIXE/EXPERIENCE/PACKAGE types, prices in cents, party size ranges, descriptions, slugs).

In-venue search with date/party/time filter. SSR delivers calendar offerings and availability for the requested date. SPA does NOT fire fresh XHR on date change — full reload via URL change re-renders SSR.
Experience detail page. Confirmed by tockstalk Cypress patterns; this is the booking flow entry point.

graphql_endpoint_status: URL not yet captured during this session; the SPA fires Apollo operations (GetTockTenConfigsForCurrentBusiness, FetchBusinessAccolades, SafetyMeasuresForCurrentBusiness, BusinessFaqs) but the wire URL was masked by the chrome-MCP guardrail. Implementation strategy: read window.__APOLLO_CLIENT__.link.options.uri at runtime via Surf-rendered HTML inspection.
implementation_strategy_for_printed_cli: Surf-fetch venue HTML pages (https://www.exploretock.com/<venue-slug>, .../search?..., .../experience/<id>/<name>) and parse window.$REDUX_STATE from inline `<script>window.$REDUX_STATE = {...};</script>` block via regex.
Use the parsed Redux state to extract: `business` slice (venue details), `calendar.offerings.experience[]` (slot/experience listings), `availability` slice (slot availability flags).
For directly-callable REST: /api/business/<int> for business detail; /api/patron for current-user profile (requires authCke session).
Apollo GraphQL: minimal usage (4 operations observed); not on critical path for v1.

auth login --chrome: import the user's exploretock.com cookies (`__cf_bm` plus the standard Tock session cookie) from local Chrome profile; opens up /api/patron and authenticated SSR data (history, pastPurchase, walkinWaitlist).
Discovery search across all of Tock: navigate /<metro-slug> pages (e.g., /chicago) which SSR-render lists of venues with calendar.offerings hydrated.
